{"query":"Michael Pruss 2025 interview Alien Romulus next film direct sequel comments","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1822,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.avpgalaxy.net/2025/02/11/may-not-be-a-direct-sequel-alien-romulus-producer-michael-pruss-talks-next-alien-film/","title":"“May Not Be A Direct Sequel” – Alien: Romulus Producer Michael Pruss Talks Next Alien Film","content":"As a side note The Wolfman is a terrible movie, it's not that monster movies are dead it's this was a terrible film.
*Alien: Earth*, on the other hand, I'd never speculate this about, given Noah Hawley's stance on the prequel films."},{"url":"https://www.budapestreporter.com/producer-shares-insight-on-alien-romulus-sequel-plans/","title":"Producer Shares Insight on Alien: Romulus Sequel Plans | Budapest Reporter","content":"We are working on ideas for another Alien film, which may not be a direct sequel to Romulus, but it certainly is a part of the existing franchise.”"},{"url":"https://weylanduplink.com/lore/alien-romulus-sequel-everything-we-know","title":"Alien: Romulus 2 - Everything we know about the next Alien movie! | Alien Lore","content":"As of October 24th, 2024 it was announced officially by 20th Century Studios that the studio had begun preparations for another Alien sequel, following on from Fede Alvarez's Alien: Romulus, which took place between Ridley Scott’s Alien and James Cameron's Aliens.
20th Century Studios head Steve Asbell confirmed they were working again with Fede Alvarez, bringing the filmmaker back to direct the next film as well.
Something occurred between April 2025 and September 2025, causing Alvarez to depart the project as director.
We've investigated the cause of the Alien: Romulus 2 delay and one major factor which affected the trajectory and momentum behind Fede's next movie was actually the reception to Noah Hawley's Alien Earth.
June 2025, Fede Alvarez revealed Alien: Romulus 2 begins filming October, 2025!
As of September 4th, 2025 Fede Alvarez announced his departure from directing Alien: Romulus 2.
Expect more updates to follow as we learn more!"},{"url":"https://www.cinemablend.com/movies/alien-romulus-producer-gives-sequel-update-little-confused-michael-pruss","title":"Alien: Romulus Producer Gives Sequel Update, And I’m A Little Confused | Cinemablend","content":"Read 1 article to unlock your first badge.
In an interview with ScreenRant at the Saturn Awards, Michael Pruss was asked questions about the Alien: Romulus sequel that has been tossed around.
It’s another movie for the franchise, but it isn’t a direct follow-up from Romulus.
Some sequels are just stuck development limbo so that's good to know.
Included the talks about the sequel have been rumors that involved Sigourney Weaver and some digital de-aging."},{"url":"https://screenrant.com/alien-romulus-movie-sequel-development-michael-pruss-response/","title":""May Not Be A Direct Sequel": Next Alien Movie Gets Intriguing Tease From Romulus Producer As Early Development Is Underway","content":"Alien: Romulus producer Michael Pruss reveals that the next Alien movie may not be a direct sequel.
During a recent interview with ScreenRant at the Saturn Awards, Pruss shares an update on the Alien: Romulus sequel, revealing that it's still very much in the early stages of development.
Pruss' comment, however, seemingly confirms that Alvarez and Scott aren't married to the idea of continuing Rain and Andy's story.
That being said, with both Alvarez and 20th Century Studios boss Steve Asbell having expressed interest in seeing Rain and Andy return, it's still entirely possible that audiences will be seeing these Alien: Romulus characters again.
Alien: Romulus grossed $350 million worldwide at the box office and has a Rotten Tomatoes score of 80%, with the audience score coming in higher at 85%.
The first two Alien movies benefited from having Sigourney Weaver as Ripley in both, and Rain could become a new Ripley-like figure for the franchise."}]}
